title: BitGo to provide infrastructure and support distribution for SoFi stablecoin
message_html: BitGo to provide infrastructure and support distribution for SoFi stablecoin ...
snippet: BitGo Bank & Trust, N.A. (“BitGo Bank & Trust”), an OCC-regulated digital asset trust bank and subsidiary of BitGo Holdings, Inc. (“BitGo”) (NYSE: BTGO), today announces that they have been selected to provide stablecoin infrastructure services and support distribution for SoFiUSD, a U.S. dollar-peg
